Camilla:
You, sir, should unmask. 
Stranger:
Indeed? 
Cassilda:
Indeed, it's time. We all have laid aside disguise but you. 
Stranger:
I wear no mask. 
Camilla:
(Terrified, aside to Cassilda.)
No mask? No mask!
